title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 620.3500 - Citation of law
text:
620.3500.  Citation of law. — Sections 620.3500 to 620.3530 shall be known and may be cited as the "Missouri Rural Access to Capital Act".
(L. 2024 S.B. 802) 
Sunset date 8-28-30, see § 620.3530
Termination date 9-01-31, see § 620.3530
